name: Hana
description: A homeless trans woman. She never knew her actual parents, and thus feels the most sympathy for "Kiyoko", the baby she finds and names. Because of her upbringing, she is the kindest out of the three main characters, but is also the sickliest, which she hides from the others.

name: Haruitsuki Abeno
description: __Height:__ 171 cm __Race:__ Human He is the second and current Master of the Mononokean. Haruitsuki is rather cold and shows no concern for humans, claiming that his work as an exorcist is for the yokais' sake. He is far more polite with yōkai, whom he wishes to help as he feels yōkai can't find help in the human world while humans will always be helped by someone. It is also shown that in the past, humans looked at him with disdain, disgust or disbelief because of his powers, which contributes

name: Mea Kurosaki
description: __Height:__ 153 cm Mea Kurosaki is a character from To-Love-Ru Darkness. She is sent to Earth to bring back the "old" Golden Darkness. It is revealed that she is Yami's younger sister as she was created by the same organization as her. At first she is found alone starring out the window until she meets Nana and becomes friends with her. She now views others as friends. It appears (in chapter 7) that she has sexual feelings towards Rito. She is described by Yami as a "second generation" transform

name: Piña Co Lada
description: The daughter of the Emperor Molt Sol Augustus and his concubine, Countess Nell. She has two brothers, Zorzal El Caesar and Diabo El Caesar both of whom were candidates for the next Emperor. She is also the leader of Rose-Order of Knights. ~!Later she becomes a mediator between Japan and her empire, and gets strongly influenced by the otaku culture.!~

name: Ryou Mashiba
description: Mashiba Ryo is one of the darker characters in the series, but has shown his lighter and good natured side from time to time. He lives with his sister, Kumi Mashiba, whom he is very protective of. Their parents are deceased, having died in an accident when Mashiba was in school. He is well known for his hitman style of boxing that utilizes one of his specialties, the flicker jab; both of which appear to be modeled after Thomas Hearns. His other specialty is a close range chopping right.
mediaTitles: Hajime No Ippo: The Fighting! - Rising -

name: Chiyoko Momoshiro
description: __Height:__ 158 cm __Affiliation:__ Stars Agency She is recognized as the hottest young actress of her generation. She is nicknamed "Angel of Stars" because of her beautiful image both in film and in real life. Her type of acting is to create a 'mask' of herself that the audience wishes to see. She doesn't delve into emotion to fit her role, because for her the important thing is her look to others. She said that her acting is the complete opposite of Kei Yonagi's acting. (Source: Act-Age Wiki)

name: Rai Mamezuku
description: Rai Mamezuku is a reclusive plant appraiser secretly employed by the Higashikata Fruit Company. name: Dr. Xeno
description: __Height:__ 180 cm (5'11") Scientist and leader of the American Colony. Similar to Senku, Xeno is brilliant when it comes to science. He is very observant, somewhat eccentric, and has a penchant for stating the word "Elegant."

name: Joker
description: Joker first appears in the Circus Arc in Kuroshitsuji, and is part of Noah’s Ark Circus which is suspected in the case of the missing children. Joker first appears to be the Ringleader in the Noah's Arks Circus, but is later revealed that he is more like " a hired shop keeper", but most of the carnies still refer to him as the boss as he directs the main show in the circus. name: Jonson
description: He's a cockroach, 2 years old, 268 cm tall. Became huge in size because of the rainwater where he lived in. Pretty much there for comedic effect, as well as part of Dr. Vaux's baseball team. His catch phrase is, "Shocking!".

name: Kazuya Hiramaru
description: __Birthplace:__ Kanagawa-ken, Japan Hiramaru was a salaryman​ that hated working. On hearing Takagi and Mashiro talking about drawing manga on the subway and finding an abandoned copy of Jack, he quit his job to be a mangaka because he thought it would be less work for him. He is a different kind of genius compared to Eiji because he is talented even though he just started to write manga more in of a spur of the moment.
